name: foundry
description: Foundry VTT co-MC integration for Wyrd Berlin

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts 2>/dev/null) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
